Interface INetworkGlobalTurnDelayEvaluator

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to the global turn delay evaluator.

[Guid("17D76A4B-1365-4E09-A4E0-9BF02DBF07B2")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface INetworkGlobalTurnDelayEvaluator

Properties

CustomPrimaryRoadCategoryMaxValue

Custom Primary road category maximum value.

int CustomPrimaryRoadCategoryMaxValue { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

CustomSecondaryRoadCategoryMaxValue

Custom Secondary road category maximum value.

int CustomSecondaryRoadCategoryMaxValue { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

DefaultSeconds

Default traversal time in seconds (for undefined turn delay categories).

double DefaultSeconds { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxReverseTurnDeflectionAngle

The maximum deviation from a pure reverse turn to be classified as a reverse turn.

int MaxReverseTurnDeflectionAngle { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxStraightTurnDeflectionAngle

The maximum deviation from a pure straight turn to be classified as a straight turn.

int MaxStraightTurnDeflectionAngle { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

TurnDelayCategories

Array of global turn delay categories in this evaluator.

IArray TurnDelayCategories { get; set; }

Property Value

IArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

UseCustomRoadCategoryRanges

Indicates whether to use custom road category ranges.

bool UseCustomRoadCategoryRanges { get; set; }

Property Value

bool
